name: docx
description: Word document skill for creating, reading, editing, validating, commenting on, and converting .docx files with professional formatting.

entrypoints.name: accept-changes
entrypoints.description: Accept tracked changes in a DOCX file.

entrypoints.name: comment
entrypoints.description: Add Word comments to an unpacked DOCX.

entrypoints.name: office-pack
entrypoints.description: Pack an unpacked Office document directory.

entrypoints.name: soffice
entrypoints.description: Run LibreOffice in headless automation workflows.

starterPrompts: Create a polished Word document from this outline.
Edit this DOCX while preserving tracked changes.
Add comments to this Word document.
